children.heading: .—Term of Original Enlistments
children.label: a .—Term of Original Enlistments
children.text: The Secretary of the Air Force may accept original enlistments of persons for the duration of their minority or for a period of at least two but not more than eight years in the Space Force.

children.heading: .—Term of Reenlistments
children.label: b .—Term of Reenlistments
children.text: The Secretary of the Air Force may accept a reenlistment in the Space Force for a period determined in accordance with paragraphs (2), (3), and (4) of .section 505(d) of this title
